messages.content: What is the source of free will?

Free will is a concept that describes the ability of a being to make choices and decisions without being forced or constrained in any way. It is the ability to act independently of external factors or influences. In other words, free will is the ability to make choices that are not predetermined or predetermined by external factors.
So what specifically would you is the most likely source for free will?

The most likely source for free will is the ability of an individual to make choices and decisions that are not predetermined or predetermined by external factors. This ability is usually attributed to consciousness, which is the ability of a being to experience the world and make sense of it.
